👋

Welcome to MyFin!

Let's set up your personal finance dashboard in a few quick steps. You can skip any step and come back later.

  • Choose where to store your data
  • Add family members
  • Set up bank accounts
  • Add credit cards
  • Track investments
🔒

Where Should We Store Your Data?

Your financial data stays 100% in your control. Choose where it lives — you can change this later in settings.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Add Family Members

Add people whose finances you want to track. Each member gets their own profile for accounts, investments, and expenses.

🏦

Add Bank Accounts

Add your savings, current, or salary accounts. You can upload bank statements later to auto-import transactions.

💳

Add Credit Cards

Track your credit cards with limits, due dates, and billing cycles. Import CC statements to track spending.

📈

Add Investments

Track mutual funds, stocks, FDs, gold, PPF, NPS, and more. MyFin supports 12+ asset types.

🎉

You're All Set!

Your finance dashboard is ready. You can always add more data from the sidebar navigation.

    👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family User Management

    Control which family members can view or edit each section of MyFin

    🔐
    Family Owner Controls
    Only the family admin can manage access permissions. Members with Edit access can add/modify data. View access is read-only. None hides the section entirely.

    Bank, Wallet & Loan Accounts

    Manage bank accounts, cash wallets, and track loan repayments

    Statements

    Import and manage bank & credit card statements

    🤖 Smart Auto-Import ℹ
    📋 How it works
    1. Click Select Folder — pick any location
    2. App auto-creates sub-folders for each bank & card
    3. Drop CSV files into the matching folder
    4. Click Scan — auto-detects bank, period & imports
    💡 New accounts auto-create folders. Deleted accounts remove them.
    📎 Detected Files

    Statement Upload Tracker

    Uploaded Missing Upload

    💬 AI Finance Chat

    Chat with Claude about your finances — powered by your real family data

    🤖 Claude AI reads your family's financial snapshot and gives personalized, context-aware answers. All data stays in your browser.
    🧠
    Claude — Your Finance AI
    ● Ready
    🧠

    Hello! I'm your AI Financial Advisor. I have access to your family's financial data including income, expenses, investments, and bank balances.

    Ask me anything — like "How much are we saving each month?", "Which investment is performing best?", or "How can we reduce expenses?"

    📊 Your Financial Snapshot
    💡 Suggested Questions

    ⚙️ Features & Settings

    Enable or disable modules to personalise your FamilyVault experience

    💱
    Currency Settings
    Set your base currency — all totals & dashboard will display in this currency
    💡 Auto Conversion: All dashboard totals, expense summaries, and investment values are automatically converted to your base currency using live exchange rates (updated hourly). Each entry also shows the original amount for reference.
    💱 Loading rates…
    🗄️
    Data Storage Provider
    Your financial data — your storage. MyFin only stores login credentials.
    📁 Not connected
    🔒 Privacy guarantee: By default, MyFin stores data only in your chosen personal storage. If you select "MyFin Cloud", data is AES-256 encrypted on your device before upload — even Anthropic cannot read it. You can switch or export anytime.
    🧪
    Developer & Testing Tools
    Scalability testing — inject dummy data to stress-test UI performance
